title: NeoPackages registry
description: Schema for registry.json — the package index consumed by the `neo` CLI (https://github.com/NeoHaskell/neocli). The CLI fetches this file, looks up each bare dependency from `neo.json` in `packages`, then enumerates the package's git tags (via `git ls-remote --tags`) to pick the highest tag satisfying the constraint. The registry itself only carries description + repository; versions are the upstream git tags.

packages.description: Map of package name → metadata. The package name is the key used in `neo.json` dependencies.

propertyNames.description: Lowercase package name. Letters, digits, `.`, `_`, `-`. Must start with a letter or digit.

description.description: Human-readable one-line description shown in errors/listings.

repository.description: Git URL of the package. Passed verbatim to `cabal.project` as `source-repository-package`/git location. The `neo` CLI runs `git ls-remote --tags` against this URL to discover the available versions. Example: `https://github.com/NeoHaskell/some-package`.
